examples: Students with high hope set themselves higher goals and know how to work to attain them.
Thus they are not able to "experience life" and so they attain a high life span in captivity.
Many of these people acquired far more experience of exploration than most Europeans could hope to attain.
One of its key takeaways is that goals are often easier to attain when pursued indirectly.
And the riskier the investments, the less likely that you will attain your goals.
